subject: Rajasthan History
question_en: Which historical battle took place near Ajmer?
question_hi: अजमेर के निर्माण के बाद कौन सी घटना निकट हुई?
explanation_en: The Battle of Amer took place near Ajmer after the construction of Amer Fort. Amer Fort is located in Jaipur, while the Battle of Haldighati and Saragarhi occurred in different regions and the Battle of Alwar is not related to Rajasthan.
explanation_hi: अजमेर तकनीकरण के बार्तावाला के पर्याय कॉम्प्रोलों की जानकारण बदलें
अजमीर फोट जानकारण बार्तावाला कॉम्प्रोलों की जानकारण बदलें
explanation_en: The correct answer is A, as the Battle of Amer took place near Jaipur, while the Battle of Haldighati and Saragarhi occurred outside Rajasthan.
